TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Tim_Breaux, title = Tim_Breaux, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tim_Breaux} }

S.FORM: Tim Breaux sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1970, ryax sa tay 19 nqu tay 9, Tim Breaux, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Tim Breaux sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1970, ryax sa tay 19 nqu tay 9, Tim Breaux, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: tim βreaux s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, tim βreaux, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
